commercialRule: Inventra updates internally; users do not open GitHub, JSON, or choose files.
releaseNotes: Fixed the 9.83.0 icon patch artifactName bug.
Locked the uploaded dental logo as the official Inventra icon authority.
Updated source, public favicon, Electron runtime icon assets, build icon, and installer icon configuration.
Updated Desktop and Start Menu shortcuts to point to the official dental icon.
No SQL, app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, or updater backend logic changed.
